mode_simple_desc: static fixed prompt based off a template
mode_interactive_desc: rich CLI text editor with autocomplete
observer_fallback: standard observer failed, falling back to 'PollingObserver' - {error}
err_type_not_found: <!-- error... no files found for types '{exts}' -->
err_dir_empty: <!-- directory '{query}' is empty or not found -->
help_text:
[ autocomplete mentions ]

<@file:>   : attach file
<@dir:>    : attach folder
<@ext:>    : attach file extension
<@git:>    : attach diff or status
<@symbol:> : attach function or class
[@project] : attach project structure

[ navigation & editing ]

^[S]       : save and generate prompt
^[Q]       : quit without saving
^[Arrow]   : move cursor (wrap)
[Shift]    : select text
^[C/X/V]   : copy / cut / paste
^[Z/Y]     : undo / redo
^[W]       : delete previous word
^[/]       : toggle comment for current line/selection
[Tab]      : indent / autocomplete
[S-Tab]    : unindent
[A-Up/Dn]  : move line up / down

press [Enter], [F1] or ^[G] to close help
git_not_found: git executable not found in system path.
